description: Create a revenue tree model for a company of your choice (based on class discussion and the book) Feel free to upload an image, or describe it through text, or draw a representation of the revenue tree with the company listed at the bottom.
name: Revenue Tree Model

description: Please submit here your one page summary and exploration of a scriptural account of someone persuading or convincing. What did you learn?
name: Scriptural Persuasion Account Paper
